judge_result.short_rationale: Core rinse action and immediate escalation are present, but contact lens timing is wrong versus the source ('after the first 5 minutes'). It also adds unsupported details like saline, eye rotation, and neutralizing chemicals. Usable in the field, but not fully source-faithful.
